propositions: Leaf plans drift from their parent's declared scope and no existing criterion catches the divergence until epic-close completion verification.
Add a new AGENT plan-review criterion G7 that checks a leaf ticket's scope is a subset of its parent's plan, with the parent winning on conflict.
G7 routes only on tickets that have a parent_id and no children (leaf-with-parent), exempting containers, parentless tickets, bugs, and session_logs, via a new require_parent_id applies_at axis.
G7's agent reads the parent ticket at runtime through its always-available show_ticket tool using the parent_id already in the ticket-graph context, requiring no new context-assembly plumbing.
G7 registers in CANONICAL_LLM and AGENT_TIER but not CODEBASE_GROUNDED, since it grounds against the ticket store rather than code.
Ship G7 advisory at 0.95 with a committed promotion-path doc documenting a jq fire-rate query over plan_review_result_v1 sidecars and a 0.6-0.7 blocking band.
